trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: The Comments History section contains no entries (no staff notes, no shipment confirmation, no delivery dates). The Order Totals show Total Paid = $0.00 and Total Due = $159.40.
WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Comments History tab on the order view page (http://localhost:7780/admin/sales/order/view/order_id/9/) and Order Totals section on the same page.
WHY IT MATTERS: A refund cannot be issued because no payment was ever captured (Total Paid $0.00). Additionally, there are no staff notes or shipment/delivery confirmations in Comments History to substantiate a delivered order or a fulfillment issue. The correct resolution is to deny the refund request and advise payment/fulfillment investigation rather than refunding unpaid funds.
